user_prompt: The cover letter you drafted is too generic. Add a sentence about their open-source contributions.
actual_output:
Absolutely. Here’s a stronger company-specific sentence you can add:

> I was especially impressed by your team’s open-source contributions, particularly the way you share practical tools and engineering learnings with the broader developer community rather than keeping that innovation entirely internal.

If you want it to sound more technical:

> Your open-source work stood out to me because it reflects an engineering culture that values reusable systems, transparent collaboration, and developer experience beyond the walls of the company.

Or more concise:

> I also admire your open-source contributions, which show a clear commitment to giving back to the developer community.

Best placement: after the sentence explaining why you’re interested in the company, before the paragraph about your relevant experience.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly fulfilled the user's request by providing several options for company-specific sentences regarding open-source contributions to improve the cover letter.
